requirements.title: One-Crate Package Boundary and No Feature Flags
requirements.description: The substrate must be implemented as a single standalone Rust package at crates/ggen-graph with no feature flags.

requirements.title: Public Ontology Governance and Vocabulary Emission
requirements.description: Vocabulary constants must be emitted directly from public ontology profiles.

requirements.title: Deterministic Graph Substrate and Delta Conservation
requirements.description: Graph parsing, serialization, canonical byte generation, hashing, and RdfDelta transitions must be deterministic.

requirements.title: Knowledge Hook Runtime & Deterministic Scheduling
requirements.description: Turtle-based hook packs must load dynamically as graph laws and schedule deterministically.

requirements.title: OCEL/PROV Evidence Projection & Replayable Receipts
requirements.description: Every graph transition must produce a replayable cryptographic receipt bundle and project PROV-O/OCEL.

requirements.title: Compliance Checks & Anti-Fake Gates
requirements.description: Must pass structural analyses checking for forbidden execution surfaces and zero placeholder/stub/mock/fake-success patterns.

requirements.title: OCEL v2 Self-Audit Log Emission
requirements.description: Implement self-audit log generator emitting vision2030.self_audit.ocel.json.

requirements.title: Coverage Matrix & Verification Scripts
requirements.description: Implement coverage mapping in coverage.rs and verify via scripts.

requirements.title: Derived GALL Checkpoint Proof Report
requirements.description: Vision 2030 GALL Checkpoint Proof Report derived from self-audit log.

requirements.title: Genesis-bearing Interchangeable Part Architecture
requirements.description: Ensure interchangeable parts where Genesis is the embedded core and ggen forms the outer membrane, adapter layer, and projection layer.
